title: Missing `cp` call for file transfers
body:
Hi, I'm currently struggling a bit with volumes/mounts that allow non-root users to store files on the host. While this works for most cases by default, it's broken (for me) within Github CI and running on a Mac.

My way around that would be to use `cp` as documented [here](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-cp.1.html). I can't seem to find any API calls for that inside this repository. Is it just not yet implemented or left out on purpose?
